case_title: ROHINTON CAVAS PALKHIVALA VS. LAFAYETTE FINE FOODS INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALKHIVALA, ROHINTON CAVAS AS TO DEFENDANT LAFAYETTE FINE FOODS INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA LAFAYETTE CAVIAR & FINE FOODS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALKHIVALA, ROHINTON CAVAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAFAYETTE FINE FOODS INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA LAFAYETTE CAVIAR & FINE FOODS $2,769.30 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,919.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALKHIVALA, ROHINTON CAVAS AS TO DEFENDANT LAFAYETTE FINE FOODS INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA LAFAYETTE CAVIAR & FINE FOODS
